jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at MyGlamm
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with MyGlamm! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Jodhpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About MyGlamm:
MyGlamm is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MyGlamm!
